SHORT NAME: BHVRL_HLTH_SCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: BHVRL_HLTH_SCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
101200000X: Drama therapist 
101Y00000X: Counselor 
101YA0400X: Counselor — addiction (substance use disorder) 
101YM0800X: Counselor — mental health
